LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS YONG LEI, QING WU, AND JANY LEI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT ESTABLISHED THAT THEY WILL NECESSARILY PREVAIL ON THEIR WAIVER ESTOPPEL OR UNCLEAN HANDS DEFENSE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437C(G). calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Andrew Westley; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Johnny Yuen is present.
Attorney, Clifford E. Fried appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants, Yong Guang Lei and Qing Ai Qu are present.
Attorney, Hilary K. Hedemark representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle, the trial date of OCT-05-2009 remains set.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREW J. WIEGEL OF THE WIEGEL & FRIED LLP, TEL. NO. 552-8230 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JETHRO BUSCH OF THE STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 956-6488 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS YONG LEI, QING WU, AND JANY LEI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT ESTABLISHED THAT THEY WILL NECESSARILY PREVAIL ON THEIR WAIVER ESTOPPEL OR UNCLEAN HANDS DEFENSE. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
